news.paragraph: XLK has experienced recent volatility, with headlines showing tech stocks falling due to higher yields and geopolitical uncertainty followed by positive commentary regarding the AI capital expenditure boom. While the sector saw significant selling pressure mid-month, the most recent news highlights the fund's potential during the AI expansion. No specific earnings or regulatory catalysts are explicitly mentioned in the recent headlines.
